title: Separation of Vanadium and Uranium by Liquid Anion-exchanger
author: SUPRA BANDYOPADHYAY
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Department of Chemistry, Burdwan University, Burdwan-713 104 

 Manuscript received 8 February 1985, revived 30 August 1985, accepted 15 November 1985 

 A rapid and selective method for the extraction of vanadium as VO 2 (C 4 H 4 O 6 ) \(_2^{3-}\) and uranium as UO 2 (NO 3 ) \(_3^-\)  with liquid anion-exchanger, Aliquat 336 (nitrate form) In chloroform and n-butanol medium respectively have been proposed. The effects of different variables on extraction have been investigated. The nature of the extracted species has been discussed. On the basis of the extraction data, mutual separat on of vanadium and uranium also separations from other commonly associated elements have been carried out.
